verb_to_be_present.name: Verb to be: present tense (am / is / are)

is_third_person_singular.name: is with he / she / it (third person singular)

be_negative_not.name: Negative: is not / are not / am not

be_yes_no_question.name: Yes/No question inversion: Is he…? / Are they…?

be_wh_question.name: Wh-question with be: Where is…? / Who are…?

be_predicate_noun.name: Be + predicate noun (He is a doctor)

be_short_answer.name: Short answer with be (Yes, I am / No, she isn't)

be_question_tag.name: Question tag with be (…, isn't it?)

saved_test.name: Verb to Be: Present Forms — Opus 4.6 V3 Questions Test
saved_test.description: Practice set for verb to be present forms: am / is / are in affirmative, negative, contracted, question, and advanced agreement patterns across A1–C2.
